mapper.select:
SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, u.nickname, p.title, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.content, 200, 1) AS content, p.category, p.view_count, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.deleted_at FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
AND p.category = #{category}
AND ( LOWER(p.title) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.content, 4000, 1)) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
ORDER BY p.post_id DESC

SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, u.nickname, p.title, p.content, p.category, p.view_count, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.deleted_at FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( user_id, title, content, category, view_count, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{request.title}, #{request.content}, #{request.category}, 0, 'ACTIVE', SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE posts SET title = #{request.title}, content = #{request.content}, category = #{request.category}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE posts SET status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL
